puzzle.title: The Star-Gazer's Revelation
puzzle.intro: In a time when celestial bodies were worshipped and idols lined the halls of power, one soul embarked on a profound intellectual and spiritual journey. Questioning the very fabric of their people's beliefs, this individual sought the one true Creator, setting a course that would lead to confrontation, exile, and the establishment of a timeless legacy.
clues: I looked to the stars, the moon, and the sun, seeking my Lord, but I knew that which sets could not be the one to worship.
My own kin was a crafter of the very idols my people revered, and I challenged this practice directly.
With an axe, I reduced a hall of false gods to rubble, leaving the largest among them untouched to expose their powerlessness.
For my defiance, I was cast into a blazing fire, a punishment meant to make an example of me.
By Allah's command, the inferno became cool and safe for me, a miracle for all to witness.
I am known as Khalilullah, the 'Friend of Allah,' and my descendants include two great lines of prophets.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Nuh
Prophet Yusuf
Prophet Ibrahim
Dhul-Qarnayn
Prophet Shu'ayb

trial.label: What was my primary confrontation?
options: Facing a great flood in an ark
Being swallowed by a giant fish
Splitting the sea with a staff
Being thrown into a fire
Being raised to the heavens alive

location.label: What did I challenge?
options: The arrogance of a wealthy treasurer
The sorcery of a court of magicians
The worship of idols and celestial bodies
Dishonesty in weights and measures
The violation of the Sabbath
location.answer: The worship of idols and celestial bodies

outcome.label: What was the immediate miraculous result?
options: My staff turned into a serpent
The fire became cool and peaceful
A spring of water gushed from the ground
A wall was built to contain a corrupting force
A nation was destroyed by a furious wind
outcome.answer: The fire became cool and peaceful

puzzle.arabic: إِنِّى وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِىَ لِلَّذِى فَطَرَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ حَنِيفًۭا ۖ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
puzzle.verse: Indeed, I have turned my face [i.e., self] toward He who created the heavens and the earth, inclining toward truth, and I am not of those who associate others with Allāh." (6:79)
